opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I step down, it feels like I'm walking on a sharp needle. I can't even get to the kitchen.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A painful lump on the sole of my foot is making it agony to walk.

symptom_narrative.character: firm rough hyperkeratotic lump on the sole, sharp stabbing pain on weight-bearing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: like walking on a needle, can't get to the kitchen
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: rough surface, tiny black dots; uses public-pool showers; NO fever, no spreading redness up the foot, not diabetic

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; communal pool showers (viral exposure)

objective_data_offered.value: firm rough lump on the sole with disrupted skin lines and tiny black dots, painful when pinched sideways, visible on video
no redness/heat/pus, foot otherwise normal, not diabetic
